specs.title: cp-000: Coach panel empty state includes descriptive helper copy and a Run Coach CTA
cp-001: Successful coach response replaces the CTA state with score bars suggestions and
cp-002: Coach suggestions are sorted by priority and capped to the top five items
cp-003: Slide insights navigate to the referenced slide by calling onNavigateToSlide
cp-004: AgentPanel starts with six quick-action buttons when no chat history exists
cp-005: Agent quick actions disappear once there is at least one message in chat history
cp-006: Agent messages can include modifiedSlideIds which are displayed back to the user
cp-007: Agent undo only resets the panel-local canUndo state and triggers onSlidesUpdate
cp-008: Agent command input trims whitespace before submission
cp-009: Agent errors are both shown inline and appended as agent chat messages prefixed
cp-010: Defense Prep configuration opens before any QA messages are shown
cp-011: Defense Prep default difficulty is moderate
cp-012: Defense Prep starts with no focus areas selected
cp-013: Starting a defense session clears prior messages summary revealed answers and qu
cp-014: Defense Prep API request omits focusAreas when none are selected
cp-015: Reviewer messages can prepend evaluation text before the generated question
cp-016: Ending a defense session computes a local summary instead of requesting one from
cp-017: Resetting the defense session returns the panel to the configuration screen
cp-018: CommentsPanel loads all comments on mount via getCommentsdeckId
cp-019: Comments filter modes are exactly all unresolved and resolved
cp-020: Under the all filter the active slide section is still shown even when it has ze
cp-021: Comments empty state shows No comments yet plus helper copy Comments on slides w
cp-022: useCommentCounts silently ignores load errors and exposes counts totalUnresolved
cp-023: CommentsPanel close button is local to the slide-over header and does not affect
cp-024: SharePanel loads current settings on mount and shows Loading share settings whil
cp-025: Share toggle uses a custom pill switch rather than a checkbox
cp-026: Enabling sharing calls enableDeckSharingdeckId and immediately stores the return
cp-027: Disabling sharing calls disableDeckSharingdeckId and flips only shareEnabled loc
cp-028: Share link input is read-only and paired with a Copy button
cp-029: Copy success swaps the button content to Copied for two seconds
cp-030: Expiration date input sets min to todays date string in local ISO format
cp-031: Share settings save button remains visible only while sharing is enabled and a s
cp-032: Share-panel failures are logged to console only and do not surface an inline err
cp-033: AnalyticsPanel fetches apianalyticsdeck-statsdeckIdid on mount
cp-034: Analytics loading state shows spinner plus text Loading analytics
